global_properties.anonymous_id: Persisted per-install UUID (durable store -> project-local cache file -> per-process).
global_properties.channel_session_id: Random UUID minted per createChannel() call.

oss.channel.configured.description: createChannel() returned; repeats per process start.

oss.channel.started.description: channel.start() connected at least one adapter.

oss.channel.agent_run.description: A successful agent invocation completed (emitted after the run loop AND finalization/transcript steps succeed). Note: an interrupt->resume turn emits two agent_run events (interrupted:true at the ack-first return, then interrupted:false after resume); filter interrupted===false to count completed runs.

oss.channel.agent_run_failed.description: An agent run errored. Emitted instead of agent_run; stage=agent for run-loop failures, stage=finalize for transcript-append/renderer-finish failures after the loop.
